indicators.name: Floor-tile
indicators.rationale: The floor tiles are smooth and non-slip, suitable for yoga practice.

indicators.name: Cabinet
indicators.rationale: The cabinets are too close to the floor, potentially obstructing movement during yoga.

indicators.name: Microwave
indicators.rationale: The microwave is too high, making it difficult to access during yoga.

reasoning_summary: The space is moderately suitable for yoga, with good flooring but some obstructions from furniture.
